composer_internal_placeholder: Internal note — not visible to customers.
composer_staff_operational_placeholder: Operational note — visible to provider team only, not to the customer.
composer_staff_completion_placeholder: Completion note — visible to the customer as proof of work.
composer_customer_internal_placeholder: Internal note — visible to your own customer-side team only, not to the provider.
no_messages: No messages yet. Be the first to reply.
preview_unsupported: Preview is not available for this file type. Download the file to view it.
attachment_too_large: Attachment file size cannot exceed 10 MB.
card_workflow_subtitle_staff_complete: This will be routed according to your building settings.
workflow_no_transitions: No status transitions available for your role.
workflow_no_transitions_available: No further status transitions are available right now.
workflow_status_note_label_staff_require: Add a completion note or attach a photo of the completed work (required)
workflow_status_note_placeholder: Add a short note for the audit trail
workflow_rejection_reason_placeholder: Explain why you reject this ticket
workflow_admin_override_approved: Normally the customer should approve this ticket. Click the button again to approve it as admin override.
workflow_admin_override_rejected: Normally the customer should reject this ticket and explain why. Click the button again to reject it as admin override.
workflow_customer_reject_warning: If you reject this ticket, please write the reason in the status note field first.
workflow_customer_rejection_required: Please write the rejection reason in the status note field first.
workflow_correction_actions_help: These are correction transitions outside the normal flow. The backend has permitted each one for you on this ticket; use them only when the standard next step doesn't apply.
workflow_wca_no_provider_decision: Waiting for the customer to approve or reject this work. Overriding the customer decision needs the override permission, which you don't have on this ticket.
composer_public_who_sees: Visible to the customer and the provider team. Use for normal conversation about this ticket.
composer_internal_who_sees: Visible only to provider admins and building managers. Not visible to the customer or to assigned field staff.
composer_staff_operational_who_sees: Visible to the provider team and the assigned field staff. Not visible to the customer. Use for work instructions and internal progress.
composer_staff_completion_who_sees: Visible to the customer as proof of completed work.
composer_customer_internal_who_sees: Visible to your own customer-side team only. Not visible to the provider or to field staff.
assignment_section_bm_helper: The building manager who owns this ticket from the provider side. They route the work and oversee its completion.
workflow_completion_evidence_hint: Please upload a photo of the completed work if possible. This helps the manager and customer verify the result. If a photo isn't available, write a short completion note instead.
workflow_completion_evidence_required: Add a completion note or attach a photo of the completed work before sending this ticket for customer approval.
card_critical_body: This ticket is flagged urgent. Prioritise dispatch and update the customer once an operator is on site.
delete_ticket_dialog_body: Only delete this ticket if it was opened accidentally. This action will hide the ticket from normal views and reports. Messages, attachments, and history are preserved for audit. To continue, type the ticket number below.
request_assignment_hint: Ask a manager to assign you to this ticket.
request_assignment_success: Request sent. A manager will review it shortly.
request_assignment_already_pending: You already have a pending request for this ticket.
request_assignment_pending_body: A manager will review your request shortly. You can cancel it before they act on it.
request_assignment_cancelled_success: Request cancelled. You can submit a new request if you change your mind.
request_assignment_cancel_dialog_body: The request will move to Cancelled. You can submit a new request for this ticket later.
assigned_staff_admin_desc: Add a staff member to this ticket directly. They do not need to submit an assignment request first.
assigned_staff_admin_no_eligible: No eligible staff for this building.
assigned_staff_admin_remove_dialog_body: {{name}} will no longer appear as assigned to this ticket. You can add them again later.
override_modal_prompt: Why are you overriding the customer's decision? This will be recorded in the audit log.
override_inline_helper: This overrides the customer's decision and is recorded in the status history.
resp_mgr.title: Responsible managers
resp_mgr.desc: Building managers jointly responsible for this ticket. This is separate from the primary assignee above.
resp_mgr.no_candidates: No eligible managers for this building.
resp_mgr.error_terminal: This ticket is closed or decided; responsible managers can't be changed.
resp_mgr.error_not_eligible: That manager isn't eligible for this building.
convert.dialog_desc: Create a new Extra Work request from this ticket. This ticket will be marked as converted and a new request is created with the line items below.
convert.intent_section_title: How should this request be handled?
convert.intent_direct_desc: Every line has an agreed price. Work starts immediately and tickets are created.
convert.intent_auto_start_desc: Work may start once the provider has set the prices for any unpriced lines.
convert.intent_request_quote_desc: Send the request for a quote before any work is scheduled.
convert.line_custom_placeholder: Describe the work for this line
convert.line_note_placeholder: Optional note visible to the customer
convert.customer_visible_note_placeholde: A note the customer will see on the request
convert.internal_note_placeholder: A note only the provider team can see
convert.error_line_invalid: Each line needs a service or a description, a quantity above zero, and a requested date.
schedule.clear_dialog_body: The scheduled date will be removed and the ticket returns to unscheduled.
schedule.error_reason_required: Provide a reason for changing the schedule.
schedule.error_terminal: This ticket is finished and can no longer be scheduled.
schedule.error_forbidden_scope: You do not have permission to schedule this ticket.
directed.label: Notify specific people
directed.private_label: Private (only the selected people can see this)
directed.private_on_hint: Only you and the people you select can see this message.
directed.private_off_hint: Everyone who can see this ticket will see this message; the selected people also get a notification.
directed.private_disabled_hint: Select at least one person to make this message private.
